Font Family:

The has-*-font-family class should be removed. This block does not have inline style.

The has-*-font-family class should be removed. This block have inline style and should be removed too.

Core block: The has-*-font-family class should not removed.

700 bold

700 bold italic

Font size

px font size

rem value font size

func value font size

Variable value: - has-*-font-size class should be removed.

Core block: has-*-font-size class should not be removed.

No unit line height

px value line height

func value line height

Columns 2: Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s, when an unknown printer took a galley of type and scrambled it to make a type specimen book.
